title: My Simple Claude Cowork System (for normal people)
summary: Claude Cowork is a workspace organization system that structures Claude interactions across three hierarchical levels (root, workstations, projects) using persistent memory, instruction files, and persistent state to function as an integrated work operating system. The system includes templates and practical use cases like email management and document drafting.
